py-textfsm-0.4.1.patch

Hello,

attached is the patch that updates py-textfsm to 0.4.1 .

Changes by upstream:

- no functional changes
- added py-six to the installation requirements

https://github.com/google/textfsm/releases/tag/0.4.1
